summary.intent: Test PR #2587 (PyGithub 2.x upgrade + GitHub App authentication) by identifying and running the minimal set of Jenkins jobs that exercise all modified code paths.
summary.outcome: Identified 3 minimal jobs covering all auth mechanisms (ocp4-scan-konflux, gen-assembly, build-fbc) and ran all 3. Two jobs passed with GitHub App auth only, but build-fbc fell back to GITHUB_TOKEN in 7 cases due to missing org context in some code paths.

repo: PR introduces 3 auth mechanisms: M1 (PyGithub REST via get_github_client_for_org), M2 (GIT_ASKPASS via get_github_git_auth_env), M3 (URL normalization via ensure_github_https_url)
art-tools Jenkins jobs accept ART_TOOLS_COMMIT=ghuser@commitish to test PR branches
All tested jobs support DRY_RUN=true for safe integration testing
GitHub App auth requires org context - get_github_git_auth_env() without org parameter falls back to GITHUB_TOKEN when multiple installations exist

code.finding: fire_and_forget now accepts env parameter to pass authentication environment variables
New module handling GitHub App authentication with get_github_client_for_org and get_github_git_auth_env functions
git_clone and async git operations (run_git_async, gather_git_async) now inject GitHub App auth via get_github_git_auth_env
clone_data method now uses ensure_github_https_url for URL conversion and get_github_git_auth_env for authentication
GitRepository class wraps get_github_git_auth_env for git clone/push operations

workflow: Minimal test coverage: identify distinct code path mechanisms, then find one job per mechanism rather than testing every modified file
For multi-org GitHub Apps, always pass org parameter to get_github_git_auth_env() to avoid PAT fallback
Jenkins MCP server can programmatically fetch job parameters and trigger builds
Test results posted as GitHub PR comments document integration testing for reviewers

friction: Initial exploration got stuck trying to read PR from external URL instead of local git branch
Jenkins MCP server tree queries required multiple attempts to get correct syntax
gen-assembly with DRY_RUN=true exits early, didn't fully exercise M1 (PyGithub) path
build-fbc revealed 7 code paths calling get_github_git_auth_env() without org parameter, causing unintended GITHUB_TOKEN fallback
GIT_PASSWORD tokens being logged in plaintext (security concern)
open_items: Fix build-fbc's 7 call sites to pass org parameter to get_github_git_auth_env() to prevent GITHUB_TOKEN fallback
Identify exact callers in build-fbc code that don't provide org context
doozerlib.source_resolver still uses SSH URLs for git ls-remote operations instead of HTTPS
GIT_PASSWORD plaintext logging redaction being addressed in separate chat
